title: Value Aggregation in Hadoop MapReduce
description: The 'lib/aggregate' directory houses classes for Hadoop MapReduce value aggregation. These classes, implementing 'ValueAggregator' interface, perform tasks like summing, finding max/min, counting unique values, and computing histograms. They accept diverse input types, utilize Java collections, and Hadoop's aggregation libraries. Collaboration with combiners enhances efficiency, adhering to Hadoop's interface stability guidelines.
